title: Monday OS - IPad App
excerpt:
When will we get a proper version of the Monday OS app for iPad? 
The iPad is moving towards iPadOS 26, and it’s increasingly being used like a laptop. I believe it can easily handle even the heaviest Monday OS functions…

posts.author: ArthurSanford (Arthur Aureliano Sanford Guimarães)
posts.cookedHtml:
When will we get a proper version of the Monday OS app for iPad?

The iPad is moving towards iPadOS 26, and it’s increasingly being used like a laptop. I believe it can easily handle even the heaviest Monday OS functions.

Currently, I have to use Monday through Safari to access all features, but the experience is still laggy and buggy. A fully functional and optimized iPad app would make a huge difference in usability and productivity.
